title: RISK #stockmarket #trading #optionstrading
text: the biggest risk you face in the market the biggest risk you face in the market isn't if the S P 500 goes up or down isn't if the S P 500 goes up or down isn't if the S P 500 goes up or down today or what the next CPI print is it's today or what the next CPI print is it's today or what the next CPI print is it's you the trader how do you treat risk and you the trader how do you treat risk and you the trader how do you treat risk and what expectations do you have for your what expectations do you have for your what expectations do you have for your performance those two things are going performance those two things are going performance those two things are going to determine your success as a Trader to determine your success as a Trader to determine your success as a Trader until next time be an hour see you later
